basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Recruitment 2026 for post of Senior Project Engineer. Candidates with Ph.D, M.E./M. Tech, B.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 02-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Kanpur official website iitk.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Engineering Stream OR M.E./M. Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with 3 years experience OR B.Tech. in Electrical/Electronic Engineering with 5 years experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: IIT Kanpur Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
